title: Kangaroo Level 1-2 — Practice Set 4: Counting & Logic
disclaimer: Original practice problems inspired by Math Kangaroo format. Not official AKSF content.

questions.question_text: How many coins are shown in the picture?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif'><circle cx='30' cy='50' r='18' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='75' cy='50' r='18' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='120' cy='50' r='18' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='165' cy='50' r='18' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='210' cy='50' r='18' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='255' cy='50' r='18' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.image_description: A row of six circular coins.
questions.solution: Count the coins one by one: there are 6 coins.

questions.question_text: What time does this clock display?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif'><circle cx='100' cy='100' r='80' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'/><text x='100' y='35' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14'>12</text><text x='170' y='105' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14'>3</text><text x='100' y='180' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14'>6</text><text x='30' y='105' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14'>9</text><line x1='100' y1='100' x2='100' y2='50' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='3'/><line x1='100' y1='100' x2='140' y2='100' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='100' cy='100' r='3' fill='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.image_description: An analog clock with hour hand at 12 and minute hand at 3.
questions.solution: The hour hand points to 12 and the minute hand points to 3, which means 15 minutes past 12, so 12:15.

questions.question_text: Anna has 3 apples. Her mom gives her 4 more apples. How many apples does Anna have now?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 80' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif'><circle cx='25' cy='40' r='15' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='60' cy='40' r='15' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='95' cy='40' r='15' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='130' y='45' font-size='20'>+</text><circle cx='165' cy='40' r='15' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='200' cy='40' r='15' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='235' cy='40' r='15' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='270' cy='40' r='15' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Three apples plus four apples.
questions.solution: 3 + 4 = 7 apples.

questions.question_text: Today is Tuesday. What day will it be tomorrow?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif'><rect x='10' y='10' width='280' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='150' y='35' text-anchor='middle' font-size='16'>Today: Tuesday</text></svg>
questions.image_description: A box labelled Today: Tuesday.
questions.solution: The day after Tuesday is Wednesday.

questions.question_text: Tim has two coins: one worth 5 cents and one worth 2 cents. How much money does he have?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 200 100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif'><circle cx='60' cy='50' r='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='60' y='55' text-anchor='middle' font-size='16'>5c</text><circle cx='140' cy='50' r='30' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='140' y='55' text-anchor='middle' font-size='16'>2c</text></svg>
questions.image_description: A 5-cent coin and a 2-cent coin.
questions.solution: 5 + 2 = 7 cents.

questions.question_text: How many squares are in the picture?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 80' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif'><rect x='10' y='20' width='40' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='70' y='20' width='40' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='130' y='20' width='40' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='190' y='20' width='40' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='250' y='20' width='40' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Five squares in a row.
questions.solution: There are 5 squares.

questions.question_text: Lisa shares 6 cookies equally between 2 friends. How many cookies does each friend get?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 120' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif'><rect x='10' y='10' width='130' height='100' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='160' y='10' width='130' height='100' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='75' y='65' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14'>Friend 1</text><text x='225' y='65' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14'>Friend 2</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Two boxes labelled Friend 1 and Friend 2.
questions.solution: 6 divided by 2 equals 3 cookies each.

questions.question_text: Sam has a red hat, a blue hat, and a green hat. How many different hats does Sam have?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif'><path d='M20 70 Q50 30 80 70 Z' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><path d='M120 70 Q150 30 180 70 Z' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/><path d='M220 70 Q250 30 280 70 Z' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Three hats of different colors.
questions.solution: Sam has 3 hats.

questions.question_text: A pencil costs 3 cents. How much do 4 pencils cost?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 80' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif'><rect x='20' y='30' width='50' height='20' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='85' y='30' width='50' height='20' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='150' y='30' width='50' height='20' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='215' y='30' width='50' height='20' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Four pencils.
questions.solution: 4 x 3 = 12 cents.

questions.question_text: The clock shows the time when Mia started her lunch. She finished lunch 30 minutes later. What time did she finish?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif'><circle cx='100' cy='100' r='80' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'/><text x='100' y='35' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14'>12</text><text x='170' y='105' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14'>3</text><text x='100' y='180' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14'>6</text><text x='30' y='105' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14'>9</text><line x1='100' y1='100' x2='140' y2='100' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='3'/><line x1='100' y1='100' x2='100' y2='50' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='100' cy='100' r='3' fill='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Clock showing 3:00.
questions.solution: Start 3:00 plus 30 minutes equals 3:30.

questions.question_text: If yesterday was Friday, what day will it be the day after tomorrow?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif'><rect x='10' y='10' width='280' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='150' y='35' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14'>Yesterday: Friday</text></svg>
questions.image_description: A note saying Yesterday was Friday.
questions.solution: Yesterday Friday, today Saturday, tomorrow Sunday, day after tomorrow Monday.

questions.question_text: Ben has 3 coins of 2 cents and 2 coins of 5 cents. How much money does he have?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 80' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif'><circle cx='30' cy='40' r='20' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='30' y='45' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12'>2c</text><circle cx='80' cy='40' r='20' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='80' y='45' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12'>2c</text><circle cx='130' cy='40' r='20' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='130' y='45' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12'>2c</text><circle cx='200' cy='40' r='20' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='200' y='45' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12'>5c</text><circle cx='250' cy='40' r='20' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='250' y='45' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12'>5c</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Three 2-cent coins and two 5-cent coins.

questions.question_text: How many triangles can you find in the picture?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 200 150' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif'><polygon points='100,20 30,130 170,130' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><line x1='100' y1='20' x2='100' y2='130' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.image_description: A big triangle divided into two triangles by a vertical line.
questions.solution: Two small triangles plus one big triangle equals 3 triangles.

questions.question_text: Emma has 12 stickers. She gives 5 to her brother. How many stickers does Emma have left?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif'><rect x='10' y='20' width='280' height='60' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='150' y='55' text-anchor='middle' font-size='16'>12 - 5 = ?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: A box showing 12 minus 5 equals question mark.
questions.solution: 12 - 5 = 7 stickers.

questions.question_text: Three children stand in a line. Tom is in front of Ana. Ana is in front of Max. Who is in the middle?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif'><circle cx='50' cy='50' r='25' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='150' cy='50' r='25' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='250' cy='50' r='25' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='50' y='95' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12'>?</text><text x='150' y='95' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12'>?</text><text x='250' y='95' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12'>?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Three circles representing three children in a line.
questions.solution: Order front to back: Tom, Ana, Max. Ana is in the middle.

questions.question_text: Which shape below has exactly 4 corners?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 80' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif'><circle cx='30' cy='40' r='25' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><polygon points='90,15 115,65 65,65' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='135' y='15' width='50' height='50' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><polygon points='210,15 240,30 240,60 210,75 180,60 180,30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><polygon points='270,15 295,40 270,65 245,40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Circle, triangle, square, hexagon, and rhombus.
questions.solution: A square has exactly 4 corners.

questions.question_text: A chocolate bar costs 10 cents. Sara has one 5-cent coin and three 2-cent coins. How much more money does she need?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif'><circle cx='40' cy='50' r='22' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='40' y='55' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12'>5c</text><circle cx='100' cy='50' r='22' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='100' y='55' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12'>2c</text><circle cx='160' cy='50' r='22' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='160' y='55' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12'>2c</text><circle cx='220' cy='50' r='22' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='220' y='55' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12'>2c</text></svg>
questions.image_description: One 5-cent coin and three 2-cent coins.
questions.solution: Sara has 5 + 2 + 2 + 2 = 11 cents. Since 11 is more than 10, she already has enough, so she needs 0 more cents.

questions.question_text: Today is Wednesday. Ten days from today, what day of the week will it be?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif'><rect x='10' y='10' width='280' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='150' y='35' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14'>Today: Wednesday, +10 days</text></svg>
questions.image_description: A note showing today is Wednesday and we add 10 days.
questions.solution: 10 days equals 1 week plus 3 days. 7 days after Wednesday is Wednesday. 3 more days brings Thursday, Friday, Saturday. So the answer is Saturday.

questions.question_text: A clock shows 9:45. How many minutes until 10:30?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif'><circle cx='100' cy='100' r='80' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'/><text x='100' y='35' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14'>12</text><text x='170' y='105' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14'>3</text><text x='100' y='180' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14'>6</text><text x='30' y='105' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14'>9</text><line x1='100' y1='100' x2='50' y2='110' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='3'/><line x1='100' y1='100' x2='50' y2='100' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='100' cy='100' r='3' fill='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.image_description: A clock showing 9:45.
questions.solution: From 9:45 to 10:00 is 15 minutes, and from 10:00 to 10:30 is 30 minutes. Total is 15 + 30 = 45 minutes.

questions.question_text: Mr. Parker has 20 pens. He gives 4 pens each to some students and has 0 left. How many students got pens?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 80' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif'><rect x='10' y='20' width='280' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='150' y='45' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14'>20 pens / 4 each = ?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Equation: 20 pens divided by 4 each equals question mark.
questions.solution: 20 divided by 4 equals 5 students.

questions.question_text: Ava, Ben, and Coco each like a different fruit: apple, banana, or cherry. Ava does not like apple. Ben does not like banana or apple. Which fruit does Coco like?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif'><rect x='10' y='30' width='80' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='50' y='55' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14'>Ava</text><rect x='110' y='30' width='80' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='150' y='55' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14'>Ben</text><rect x='210' y='30' width='80' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='250' y='55' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14'>Coco</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Three boxes labelled Ava, Ben, Coco.
questions.solution: Ben likes cherry (not apple or banana). Ava does not like apple, so Ava likes banana. That leaves apple for Coco.

questions.question_text: A bus leaves at 8:00 and the ride takes 45 minutes. At what time does the bus arrive?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif'><rect x='20' y='30' width='120' height='50' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor' rx='10'/><circle cx='45' cy='85' r='8' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='115' cy='85' r='8' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='80' y='60' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14'>BUS</text><text x='220' y='60' font-size='14'>8:00 + 45 min</text></svg>
questions.image_description: A bus with the text 8:00 plus 45 minutes.
questions.solution: 8:00 plus 45 minutes is 8:45.

questions.question_text: How many small squares make up the large square shown?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif'><rect x='20' y='20' width='160' height='160' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><line x1='60' y1='20' x2='60' y2='180' stroke='currentColor'/><line x1='100' y1='20' x2='100' y2='180' stroke='currentColor'/><line x1='140' y1='20' x2='140' y2='180' stroke='currentColor'/><line x1='20' y1='60' x2='180' y2='60' stroke='currentColor'/><line x1='20' y1='100' x2='180' y2='100' stroke='currentColor'/><line x1='20' y1='140' x2='180' y2='140' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.image_description: A large square divided into a 4 by 4 grid of small squares.
questions.solution: The square is divided into 4 rows and 4 columns, so 4 x 4 = 16 small squares.

questions.question_text: Four children share 20 candies so that each gets the same amount. Then one child gives 1 candy to another. How many candies does the child who received now have?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif'><rect x='10' y='20' width='60' height='60' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='80' y='20' width='60' height='60' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='150' y='20' width='60' height='60' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='220' y='20' width='60' height='60' fill='#e8e8e8' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='40' y='55' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14'>5</text><text x='110' y='55' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14'>5</text><text x='180' y='55' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14'>5</text><text x='250' y='55' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14'>5</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Four boxes, each with 5 candies.
questions.solution: 20 divided by 4 equals 5 each. The receiver has 5 + 1 = 6 candies.
